error_signature: Bad request - please check your parameters
title: Invalid parameters for Xero invoice creation
symptom: When attempting to create an invoice in Xero using data from WooCommerce, the error 'Bad request - please check your parameters' is displayed, indicating an issue with the provided contact ID.
applies_when: Using Xero node to create an invoice
not_this_if: Contact ID is correctly mapped from Xero
No error occurs during invoice creation
root_cause: The error occurs because the contact ID being sent to Xero does not match the expected format or value. This can happen if the contact ID from WooCommerce is not correctly linked to the corresponding Xero contact, leading to invalid data being sent in the request.
fix_steps: Retrieve all Xero contacts using the Xero node.
Merge the Xero contacts with the new WooCommerce order based on the company name.
Ensure that the company names in both Xero and WooCommerce match exactly.
Extract the correct contact ID from the merged results.
Map the extracted contact ID to the contactID field in the Xero node for invoice creation.
agent_instruction: Merge Xero contacts with WooCommerce orders to find the correct contact ID before creating the invoice.
